name: bifrost
description: Bifrost — MSP automation platform. Skills for building workflows, forms, agents, and apps with the Bifrost SDK + CLI, setting up local Bifrost development, and packaging Bifrost agents as Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Build, set up, and package Bifrost automation artifacts
interface.longDescription: Use Bifrost skills to build workflows, forms, agents, and apps with the Bifrost SDK and CLI; set up local Bifrost development; and package Bifrost agents as Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork plugins.
defaultPrompt: Help me build a Bifrost workflow, form, agent, or app.
Set up this project for local Bifrost development.
Package a Bifrost agent as a Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork plugin.
